title: Error mounting secrets when building image inside container ran on Podman
body:
### Issue Description

Hi. We have VM that runs Podman. Then we have container that runs Podman too. Inside this container we are building image and it fails during step which mounts secrets. This error does not occur when building image on main VM. It also works fine on another VM with Docker installed.

Moving step 2 which mounts volumes after step 4 that mounts the secret solves the issue (no fail/no error). It's still annoying and restricts building images in a weird way.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Setup container with Docker on a VM running Podman
2. Try to builds following image inside the container

FROM <ANY_BASE>
VOLUME /etc/app /var/lib/app /var/log/app
ARG SVC_USERNAME
RUN --mount=type=secret,id=svc_password yum --setopt=*.username=${SVC_USERNAME} --setopt=*.password=$(cat /run/secrets/svc_password) update -y

3. It fails in our case

### Describe the results you received

STEP 1/21: FROM <BASE>
STEP 2/21: VOLUME /etc/app /var/lib/app /var/log/app
STEP 3/21: ARG SVC_USERNAME
STEP 4/21: RUN --mount=type=secret,id=svc_password     yum --setopt=*.username=${SVC_USERNAME} --setopt=*.password=$(cat /run/secrets/svc_password) update -y
WARN[0000] pkg/bind: error unmounting "/var/tmp/buildah2186205863/mnt/buildah-bind-target-11": retrieving list of mounts: read /proc/thread-self/mountinfo: bad file descriptor
ERRO[0000] did not get container create message from subprocess: EOF
ERRO[0000] retrieving list of mounts: read /proc/thread-self/mountinfo: bad file descriptor
error running container: from /usr/bin/runc creating container for [/bin/sh -c yum --setopt=*.username=${SVC_USERNAME} --setopt=*.password=$(cat /run/secrets/svc_password) update -y]: time="2025-06-18T14:15:49Z" level=error msg="runc create failed: unable to start container process: error during container init: error mounting \"/var/lib/containers/storage/overlay-containers/cf03263bcda0c2717af1f8a1b17b893b0046db478bb057cc82db9a254703bd73/userdata/overlay/3407223614/merge\" to rootfs at \"/etc/kafka\": mount /var/lib/containers/storage/overlay-containers/cf03263bcda0c2717af1f8a1b17b893b0046db478bb057cc82db9a254703bd73/userdata/overlay/3407223614/merge:/etc/kafka (via /proc/self/fd/6), data: lowerdir=/var/lib/containers/storage/overlay/b4f72fec52c6545b72f8fa69dc77bf1ee679a68cd3ccedd3e6026e14bded12de/merged/etc/kafka,upperdir=/var/lib/containers/storage/overlay-containers/cf03263bcda0c2717af1f8a1b17b893b0046db478bb057cc82db9a254703bd73/userdata/overlay/3407223614/upper,workdir=/var/lib/containers/storage/overlay-containers/cf03263bcda0c2717af1f8a1b17b893b0046db478bb057cc82db9a254703bd73/userdata/overlay/3407223614/work: invalid argument"
: exit status 1
Error: building at STEP "RUN --mount=type=secret,id=svc_password yum --setopt=*.username=${SVC_USERNAME} --setopt=*.password=$(cat /run/secrets/svc_password) update -y": while running runtime: exit status 1

### Describe the results you expected

Image should build normally

### podman info output

### Podman in a container

Yes

### Privileged Or Rootless

Privileged

### Upstream Latest Release

No

### Additional environment details

Onprem VM - podman version 5.4.0
Container - podman version 4.9.4-rhel


### Additional information

Happens every time when running settings described above

comments.body: Fixed after updating Podman engine inside container to 5.4.0
